visual_mood: Morning commute confidence -- harsh sun outside the MRT station, one guy unbothered while everyone else squints

scene.location: MRT-3 North Avenue station exit, Quezon City
scene.time_of_day: Early morning, 7:30am harsh tropical sun, direct overhead light
scene.atmosphere: Busy commuter crowd flowing out of the station, humid morning air, jeepneys and buses in the background, typical QC morning chaos
scene.lighting: Direct morning sunlight from the east, strong highlights on skin and clothing, hard shadows on concrete, sun flare hitting naturally
scene.product_placement: Worn on face, sitting naturally on the bridge of the nose and resting on both ears, frames catching morning sun
scene.format: Vertical portrait format, 9:16 aspect ratio, optimized for mobile.

product.instruction: The sunglasses should look like a real pair photographed in this scene -- matching the style shown in the reference image. They must look like physical objects with real shadows and highlights, not a digital composite or 3D render.

subject.description: Filipino male, early 20s, slim build, wearing a plain white tee and a sling bag over one shoulder
subject.action: Walking out of the MRT station into the sun, one hand adjusting the sling bag strap, slight head tilt up toward the sun
subject.emotion: Effortlessly cool, slight smirk, unbothered by the heat

prompt: The subject wears Bandits Blue from DuberyMNL, a real pair of glossy sunglasses matching the style in the reference image -- they must look like a photographed physical object, not a digital paste or 3D render.
